MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ASHLEY MULHORN, Esq. of Collection At Law, Inc. (Tel: 818-716-7630) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ADMISSION AS ADMITTED.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed; motion granted. The matters at issue will be deemed admitted and/or authenticated if responses are not served at or before the hearing.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
